extra.reason: Documented natural-language music recommender product and architecture direction under docs.

Created PR #1, performed code review with no blocking findings, validated, and merged Phase 0 into main.
Architecture document was completed and committed previously; restoring closed status after Beads export reconciliation.
Implemented Phase 1 deterministic recommender core with catalog readers, domain models, scoring, tests, and plan updates.
Created PR #2, completed review, fixed the S3 catalog-loading observation, validated, and merged Phase 1 into main.

Implemented Phase 2 agentic intent and orchestration with OpenAI Agents SDK integration, deterministic tool-backed recommendations, guardrails, local CLI, documentation, and tests. Forced because the dependency display still reports Phase 1 open even though bd show confirms it is closed.

Implemented Phase 3 API-only demo with FastAPI routes for recommendations, playlists, feedback, and profile sync; added local API CLI, demo scripts, docs, env defaults, and tests.
Completed the AWS serverless deployment foundation as part of the Phase 3 API branch: SAM template, Lambda handler, health route, docs, and tests are committed.
Created PR #4, posted PR review findings, fixed the actionable issues, validated locally, commented with the fix summary, and pushed the branch.
Created plans/live-spotify-profile-strengthening.md with a repo-aware implementation plan for strengthening live Spotify profile sync without making DynamoDB part of this step.

Implemented live Spotify profile strengthening: paginated saved/top/playlist reads, enriched profile metadata and affinities, API sync controls, readiness checks, docs, scripts, and validation without live Spotify calls.
Fixed PR review findings and added regression coverage.
Created session persistence and playlist validation implementation plan.
Implemented session persistence and playlist validation.
Added local API demo runbook and documented env readiness gaps.
Fixed demo helper scripts for no-auth local runs and isolated recommendation test profile cache state.
Adjusted ranking to make prompt mood dominant and prevent featureless profile candidates from swamping prompt-sensitive tracks.

Implemented and validated the first slice: Spotify profile medallion extraction, S3 reader alignment, S3 readiness command, docs, and tests.
Implemented DynamoDB runtime stores, service wiring, SAM table/env updates, and tests.
Operational single-user AWS product implemented, deployed, and validated end to end.
SAM stack deployed and live API/S3/DynamoDB/Spotify smoke validation passed.
